data.title: Authorities seizing $200K in USDT linked to a $500K scam involving a fake crypto trading platform targeting a victim in Massachusetts.
data.description: Authorities confiscated $200,000 from a victim in Massachusetts, who had transferred over $500,000 to a presumed fraudulent cryptocurrency trading platform.

data.title: First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) to release Q4 earnings on Jan. 15. Expected to report 46 cents/share, up from 43 cents/share last year. Quarterly revenue estimate is $862.8 million, up from $824 million. Stock price at $24.17. Analyst ratings available on Benzinga.
data.description: Before the market opens on Thursday, Jan. 15, First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings. Analysts predict the Memphis-based company will report earnings of 46 cents per share, compared to 43 cents per share in the same quarter last year. The anticipated quarterly revenue for First Horizon is $862.8 million, an increase from $824 million in the previous year. Despite this, the company's shares experienced a slight decline of 0.2% on Tuesday, trading at $24.17. For more information and the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's platform. This data is available for sorting based on various variables like stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, and rating changes. To access more insights, visit Benzinga's website.

data.title: Austin-based managed security solutions provider Beyond Secure acquired by new platform NuView, facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions.
data.description: Viking Mergers & Acquisitions recently oversaw a deal in Austin, Texas on January 13, 2026. Beyond Secure, a company from Austin specializing in managed security solutions for regulated industries, was acquired by NuView, a newly-established platform focusing on managed IT and cybersecurity. The acquisition marks an important development in the industry, highlighting the growing trend of consolidation and strategic partnerships. The deal showcases the increasing value of specialized security services, particularly in regulated sectors. No specific financial figures were disclosed regarding the acquisition.

data.title: Crypto's future in 2026 depends on institutions, rates, and retail comeback after a lackluster 2025 with Bitcoin and altcoins.
data.description: The recent rally in Bitcoin in 2025 has been relatively subdued, indicating a shift in the market. The decrease in the altcoin cycle also suggests a change in the crypto market structure. Moving forward into 2026, the outlook for cryptocurrency is likely to be influenced by institutional investors, interest rates, and the return of retail investors. This shift in market dynamics signifies a significant change in the crypto landscape and highlights the growing importance of external factors in determining the future performance of digital assets.

data.title: Standard Motor Products has over 1,150 components in its Evaporative Emissions program, keeping up with stricter emission guidelines.
data.description: Important information regarding The Standard® Evaporative Emissions program reveals its dominance in the aftermarket industry with over 1,150 precisely engineered components in various categories. As emission regulations become more stringent, there is a notable rise in issues related to EVAP systems, contributing to an increased number of check engine lights and service opportunities. These developments indicate a growing demand for solutions in this area.

data.title: Bronx child awarded $2.35 million for severe lead poisoning due to landlord neglect. Families urged to seek legal help for lead exposure.
data.description: A recent settlement has been reached in the Bronx, New York, resolving claims against a landlord for toxic lead paint exposure leading to severe neurological harm. Families worried about potential lead exposure in their homes are urged to seek free legal consultation. The announcement was made on Jan. 13, 2026, by The Frankel Law Firm, with additional details regarding the case and the compensation provided for those affected. This settlement serves as a reminder of the importance of addressing lead exposure issues promptly and seeking appropriate legal assistance.

data.title: Joseph King appointed to ECI Group Board of Managers as Chairman of Audit Committee; ECI welcomes his expertise.
data.description: In Atlanta, on January 13, 2026, ECI Group announced the appointment of Joseph King, a retired Ernst & Young Partner, to its Board of Managers. King will also take on the role of Chairman of the Audit Committee. The company expressed enthusiasm for having King join their board, highlighting his extensive experience.

data.title: Wall Street analysts foresee Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) reporting Q4 earnings of $2.45 per share, up from $2.22 per share last year. Consensus estimate for revenue is $17.75 billion, up from $16.22 billion. The bank made a majority investment in Olsson, Inc. Stock price was down by 1.7% to $183.34.
data.description: Morgan Stanley is set to unveil its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, Jan. 15. Analysts are projecting the bank to post earnings of $2.45 per share, a rise from $2.22 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $17.75 billion, up from $16.22 billion a year ago. Recently, Morgan Stanley's private equity arm made a majority investment in Olsson, Inc., an engineering firm. Following this news, Morgan Stanley's shares dropped by 1.7% to reach $183.34 on Tuesday. For further details, readers can find the complete story on Benzinga.com, where the latest analyst ratings can also be accessed by sorting through stock tickers, company names, and analyst firms.

data.title: Global Zero Trust Security Market expected to grow from USD 35.24B in 2021 to USD 190.27B by 2035, due to increasing digital transformation.
data.description: Dublin - A recent report on the Zero Trust Security Market predicts significant growth in the industry. The market, valued at USD 35.24 billion in the current year, is anticipated to reach USD 190.27 billion by 2035. The report analyzes various factors such as type of authentication, solution, deployment, offering, service, security feature, end user, company size, and key geographical regions. This growth trajectory highlights the increasing importance of zero trust security in the global market, with substantial expansion expected in the coming years.

data.title: Variscite in Tel Aviv, Israel, receives ISO/IEC 27001 Certification for following information security standards.
data.description: Variscite, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, has recently obtained the ISO/IEC 27001 certification. This certification serves as validation that the company complies with international best practices in information security. ISO/IEC 27001 is a renowned standard that outlines requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continuously improving an information security management system. This achievement signifies Variscite's commitment to ensuring the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information within their organization.

data.title: Kenya has 13 existing data centers with Nairobi as primary hub. IXAfrica, Digital Realty, and Safaricom lead in capacity. Nairobi emerging data center hotspot - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: In Dublin, the database "Kenya Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. Currently, there are approximately 13 data centers in Kenya, with Nairobi serving as the main digital infrastructure center. Key operators in terms of capacity in Kenya include Digital Realty, IXAfrica, and Safaricom. Nairobi is emerging as a significant data center location with upcoming projects by IXAfrica, solidifying its position. Both global and regional companies like IXAfrica are contributing to the growth of Nairobi as a prominent data center hub.
